message:
fix: shorten keywords for crates.io 20-char limit

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ authors.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 readme = "README.md"
 description = "Dynamic spectral graph sparsification: always-on compressed world model for real-time graph analytics"
-keywords = ["graph", "spectral-sparsification", "dynamic-graph", "laplacian", "effective-resistance"]
+keywords = ["graph", "sparsification", "dynamic-graph", "laplacian", "spectral"]
 categories = ["algorithms", "data-structures", "science", "mathematics"]
 homepage = "https://ruv.io"
 documentation = "https://docs.rs/ruvector-sparsifier"
